message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant RtpSenderEgress as "RtpSenderEgress"
participant ModuleRtpRtcpImpl as "ModuleRtpRtcpImpl"
participant PacketRouter as "PacketRouter"
participant ProcessThreadImpl as "ProcessThreadImpl"
participant PacingController as "PacingController"
participant PacedSender as "PacedSender"
participant RTPSender as "RTPSender"
participant RTPSenderAudio as "RTPSenderAudio"

participant AudioCodingModuleImpl as "AudioCodingModuleImpl"
participant ChannelReceive as "ChannelReceive"
participant ChannelSend as "ChannelSend"
participant AcmReceiver as "AcmReceiver"

participant AudioSendStream as "AudioSendStream"
participant AudioMixerImpl as "AudioMixerImpl"
participant AudioTransportImpl as "AudioTransportImpl"

participant AudioDeviceBuffer as "AudioDeviceBuffer"
participant AudioTrackJni as "AudioTrackJni"
participant AudioRecordJni as "AudioRecordJni"

participant DataRecorded0 as "DataRecorded0"

RtpSenderEgress ->> ModuleRtpRtcpImpl: SendPacket()
ModuleRtpRtcpImpl ->> PacketRouter: SendPacket()
PacketRouter ->> ProcessThreadImpl: SendPacket()
ProcessThreadImpl ->> PacingController: Process()
PacingController ->> PacedSender: EnqueuePackets()
PacedSender ->> RTPSender: SendAudio()
RTPSender ->> RTPSenderAudio: SendToNetwork()
RTPSenderAudio ->> AudioCodingModuleImpl: Add10MsData()
AudioCodingModuleImpl ->> ChannelReceive: Encode()
ChannelReceive ->> ChannelSend: SendData()
ChannelSend ->> AcmReceiver: SendRtpAudio()
AcmReceiver ->> AudioSendStream: SendAudio()
AudioSendStream ->> AudioTransportImpl: ProcessAndEncodeAudio()
AudioTransportImpl ->> AudioMixerImpl: SendAudioData()
AudioMixerImpl ->> AudioDeviceBuffer: DeliverRecordedData()
AudioDeviceBuffer ->> AudioTrackJni: RecordedDataIsAvailable()
AudioTrackJni ->> AudioRecordJni: DeliveredData()
AudioRecordJni ->> DataRecorded0: DataRecorded0()

@enduml
